title: SimpleKits
description: A simple starter kit plugin for new players
body:
# SimpleKits Plugin

Plugin that gives configureable starter kit to new players upon their first join.

## Features

- ✅ Folia compatible (uses entity scheduler)
- ✅ Works with Java, Bedrock, and offline accounts
- ✅ Tracks players by both UUID and username
- ✅ Configurable starter kit items
- ✅ Reload command: `/skr` or `/simplekitsreload`
- ✅ Verbose logging option
- ✅ Data persistence via playerdata.yml

## Configuration

Edit `config.yml` to customize:
- `verbose`: Enable/disable detailed logging
- `starter-kit`: List of items to give (format: `material_name` or `material_name amount`)

## Commands

- `/skr` or `/simplekitsreload` - Reload configuration (requires OP or `simplekits.reload` permission)

## Data Storage

Player data is stored in `plugins/SimpleKits/playerdata.yml` to track who has received the starter kit.
